title: Senior Teacher - IIT Delhi - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Delhi - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Delhi, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Nashik operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Delhi:
IIT Delhi is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Delhi!
